_comment: Sample MEASURED crowd density (AGGREGATE only — no individuals). Stands in for a CCTV/WiFi feed. To exercise calibration: set RAILSETU_CROWD_SENSOR=stub, RAILSETU_CROWD_SENSOR_FIXTURE=fixtures/crowd_observations.sample.json, RAILSETU_CALIBRATION_ENABLED=true, then POST /api/calibration/run. Nodes below are the real FOB choke-point junctions the model flags on the kumbh_surge scenario; the densities are illustrative observed values that differ slightly from the model so the correction goes both ways (tighten where the model under-predicts, loosen where it over-predicts).

observations.note: approach corridor — in line with model
